name: Cookie Cutter Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare a 13 x 9-inch baking pan by lining it with foil that extends over the edges to form handles.
3. In a saucepan, melt chocolate and margarine until the chocolate is completely melted.
4. In a mixing bowl, combine sugar and flour.
5. Add egg whites, vanilla, and walnuts to the dry ingredients and mix well.
6. Mix in the chocolate-margarine mixture.
7. Spread the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes.
9. Cool in the pan.
10. Refrigerate for 30 minutes to make cutting easier.
11. Lift out of the pan using the foil handles and invert onto the back of the pan.
12. Carefully remove the foil and invert onto a cutting board.
13. Cut into desired shapes with a cookie cutter.
14. Decorate as desired with icing, glaze, mini marshmallows, small candies, sugar crystals, or colored sprinkles.
